summary: Implemented Stage 8E review result CLI ingestion through review-result-ingest, validating review result JSON, persisting review progress/artifact links, and optionally routing accepted findings into repair tasks without launching live workers.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_review_cli.py tests/test_review_persistence.py tests/test_review_repairs.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
uv run --no-sync ruff check src\codex_supervisor\cli.py tests\test_review_cli.py scripts\check_file_justification.py --no-cache
uv run --no-sync ruff format --check src\codex_supervisor\cli.py tests\test_review_cli.py scripts\check_file_justification.py --no-cache

tests_run.summary: 320 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

CLI loads a review result JSON file, val.evidence: review-result-ingest loads --review-result-path JSON, validates it through validate_review_result_payload, calls record_review_result, and tests assert review_result_recorded progress plus review-result artifact links.

CLI supports optional supporting review.evidence: The command accepts repeated --review-artifact-id values and --create-repair-tasks, then routes accepted findings through create_repair_tasks_from_review_result with source task and verification command options.

CLI JSON output reports persisted progre.evidence: tests/test_review_cli.py asserts JSON output includes progress, artifact_links, created_task_ids, existing_task_ids, and skipped waived/needs_hitl finding records.

Focused tests cover persistence-only ing.evidence: tests/test_review_cli.py covers persistence-only ingestion, repair routing, invalid payload rejection, existing repair task reruns, and asserts no worker_runs are created.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 8E diff.

risks: The CLI records review evidence before optional repair task routing, so a routing failure after successful persistence would leave durable review evidence without repair tasks.
Live review worker launch remains out of scope until Codex Exec preflight is resolved.
follow_up_tasks: Consider a later transactional ingestion helper if review persistence and repair task routing need to commit or roll back together.
Shape a later repair-loop execution slice once accepted findings from real review lanes are available.
handoff_notes: Stage 8E adds review-result-ingest in cli.py. It validates Stage 8B review result JSON, persists Stage 8C review evidence/artifact links, optionally invokes Stage 8D repair routing, and does not launch live Codex workers.
